steps.name: environment-foundation
steps.summary: Confirmed local LOVE CLI at C:\Program Files\LOVE\lovec.exe (LOVE 11.5), no luac on PATH, added PowerShell env/syntax/package scripts, and created build/ plus build/windows/.

steps.name: project-skeleton
steps.summary: Created main.lua/conf.lua, core state/game/input/save_manager skeletons, and workspace folders for src/data/assets/saves/build without adding progress saves.

steps.name: scene-shells
steps.summary: Added title/game/pause/gameover/ending scene shells with mouse-click transitions, child_room restart hook, and minimal settings/inventory/map placeholders.

steps.name: room-navigation
steps.summary: Added data-driven Stage 1 room navigation via data/rooms.lua, data/room_objects.lua, src/systems/room_system.lua, src/systems/interaction_system.lua, and wired game_scene.lua to start at child_room and move by door or edge hitboxes.

steps.name: inventory-items
steps.summary: Added data/items.lua with the 10 Stage 1 items, runtime-only inventory system/UI, item_pickup handling in interaction_system, and wired game_scene inventory selection/use flow without progress saves.

steps.name: map-ui
steps.summary: Added runtime-only map_system/map_ui with 1F/2F/basement/attic floor plans, map button toggle, current-room marker, and removed always-on room-name display from gameplay.

steps.name: stage-data
steps.summary: Added Stage 1 data files for puzzle inputs/chains, events, monster nodes, sound metadata, and stage rules; aligned room/item resource paths and clue object ids for downstream systems.

steps.name: puzzle-system
steps.summary: Added data-driven puzzle_system and puzzle_ui for number_lock, symbol_sequence, silent_sequence, color_sequence, symbol_item_matching, and item_use, with success rewards/events and non-lethal failure danger hooks.

steps.name: monster-fsm
steps.summary: Added src/ai/fsm.lua and src/ai/monster.lua with room/node-based monster state, event hooks for kitchen appearance/final chase/player capture, and game_scene integration for player room updates.

steps.name: danger-system
steps.summary: Added src/ai/danger.lua with runtime danger/noise/stay/capture/hide-noise tracking, puzzle/event/final-chase hooks, pressure warning hooks, and gameover capture integration.

steps.name: hiding-system
steps.summary: Added hide_spot entry handling, mouse-acceleration-based hiding danger/noise, danger gauge UI, detection/gameover hooks, and Stage 1 hide spot data including living_room_curtain_hide for final chase.

steps.name: stage1-integration
steps.summary: Connected Stage 1 runtime flow with fresh child_room starts, breaker-box electricity restoration, basement/altar unlock flags, front_door_key final chase trigger, stage1_clear save-only completion, and restart-safe in-memory run state.

steps.name: resource-fallback-assets
steps.summary: Generated replaceable placeholder resources for every referenced asset path: 40 dark PNG image placeholders and 62 valid silent OGG files, added generation/verification scripts, and verified 102 referenced assets are present and readable.

steps.name: love-package
steps.summary: Created build/EscapeFromNightmares.love with scripts/package-love.ps1 after verifying Step 12 resources; archive includes only main.lua, conf.lua, src/, data/, and assets/ and passed a LOVE smoke run.

steps.name: windows-package
steps.summary: Created build/windows/EscapeFromNightmares.exe by appending build/EscapeFromNightmares.love to the local LOVE 11.5 runtime, copied required DLL/runtime files, verified 102 packaged assets, and passed a Windows exe smoke run.
